channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Stop the Unfair Criticism of Fathers
The Past Is a Guide — and It Points Toward Freedom
item.description: Progressivism’s rejection of liberty overlooks the history that the Founders understood.

item.title: Sports Journalists Jettison Their Affection for Silent Protest
item.description: When Kaepernick kneeled, he was a hero. When a few Giants players quote the Bible, that’s another story.

item.title: A Tale of Two Shows in Philly for America’s 250th
item.description: PAFA’s shines, thanks in part to a dazzling renovation, the PMA’s not so much.
